title: Progress Registry
description: CPT-83: Jira-native progress registry. Lives in the description of the pinned 'Session Progress Registry' ticket under each project's epic. Read on every loop cycle; written atomically with optimistic-locking (Phase 3.1).

version.description: Registry schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

lastUpdated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last registry write. Set on every append/rollover.

currentProgressTicket.description: Active progress ticket key (e.g., CPT-90). Writes target this ticket until rollover.

archivedTickets.description: Historical progress tickets rolled over from this role. Append-only.

cycleCount.description: Total cycles observed for this role (across all its tickets, current + archived).

lastCycleAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent cycle comment posted for this role. null before the first cycle.

roles.description: Per-role registry entries. Keys MUST be from the canonical 11-role list; any other key is rejected.
